rounds: Purple Country Road bag to the food shop — self-talk caught live, flipped it mid-stream, wore it anyway. That's a round won on instinct, not armour. Pink jockstrap to Balmoral two weeks running now, that's a streak. But the Apollo ring and necklace at work? Dropped them both — pool nerves, pendant reading as obviously gay, ring size — named it clearly, still lost the round. Joy police are getting louder at work specifically.
pattern: They're quiet with strangers, loud with his people — and loudest when the thing might read as obviously gay.
